1790870.name: Fantasteroids
1790870.description:
Enjoy a refreshing arcade-like blast to the past with Fantasteroids.
A game with a simple concept, which is easy to pick up but hard to master.
You will need incredible precision, an unblinking eye to watch for hazards, and a stamina to match a marathon runner's.

Features

  • Fast-paced gameplay
  • A variety of different modes and experiences for you to choose from
  • Over 20 different characters and skins to unlock
  • Steam leaderboards so you can play and compete with people around the world!
1790870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
